_note: on_hand = physical count as of _as_of. DELIVERED orders dated AFTER _as_of auto-decrement 'remaining' (see tools/orders/inventory_report.compute_report). ON RESTOCK: set on_hand to the new physical total AND bump _as_of to that date, so prior deliveries don't re-subtract. 2026-06-10: +8 outback-black restock; -1 bandits-blue, -1 bandits-green (manual). 2026-06-10: Roy Cañete order DELIVERED -- the bandits-matte-black pending pair shipped; manually decremented 3->2 (order dated 6/9 < _as_of so it does NOT auto-decrement).
